title: POC CSAT Operator v1
description: Custom operator for POC. Captures the actual end-of-conversation closure-confirmation outcome. Split out from POC Analytics v3 to free up prompt budget. inferred_csat stays on the Analytics operator. Twilio auto-sets all fields as required and additionalProperties to false.

actual_csat.description: Outcome of the AI's end-of-conversation confirmation question (e.g., "Did I resolve your inquiry?"). YES if the customer confirmed positively (problem solved). NO if the customer said no or expressed unresolved dissatisfaction. NOT_ANSWERED if the AI asked the closure question but the customer did not answer (silence, hang-up before responding, irrelevant reply). NOT_ASKED if the AI did not ask the closure question — typically because the customer was transferred to a human before closing or the AI failed to prompt for confirmation. Distinct from inferred_csat (which is derived from overall sentiment); this captures the explicit yes/no response when asked.
